task_completion.description: Set font sizes to default 20px, fixed 18px, and minimum 14px
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Customize fonts' settings page showing the 'Font size' slider/value at 20, 'Fixed-width font' size at 18, and 'Minimum font size' slider/value at 14.

task_completion.description: Enable Force Dark Mode, Smooth Scrolling, and Reader Mode via chrome://flags
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chrome://flags page showing 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents', 'Smooth Scrolling', and 'Enable Reader Mode' with their dropdowns set to 'Enabled' (often highlighted with a blue dot).

task_completion.description: Block content permissions for notifications, geolocation, camera, microphone, and popups
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Site settings' or specific permission pages showing Location, Camera, Microphone, Notifications, and Pop-ups and redirects configured to 'Don't allow sites to...' or 'Blocked'.

task_completion.description: Disable passwords, address autofill, and payment autofill
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Autofill and passwords' settings showing toggles turned OFF for 'Offer to save passwords', 'Save and fill addresses', and 'Save and fill payment methods'.

task_completion.description: Set homepage to nypl.org and configure startup pages to nypl.org and digitalcollections.nypl.org
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Appearance' settings showing the Home button enabled with 'https://www.nypl.org' entered, AND 'On startup' settings showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected with 'nypl.org' and 'digitalcollections.nypl.org' in the list.

task_completion.description: Set download directory to Patron_Downloads and enable 'always ask'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Downloads' settings showing the Location path ending in '/home/ga/Documents/Patron_Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned ON.

task_completion.description: Block third-party cookies, enable Do Not Track, and set Safe Browsing to Enhanced Protection
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Privacy and security' settings showing 'Block third-party cookies' selected, the toggle for 'Send a Do Not Track request with your browsing traffic' turned ON, and 'Enhanced protection' selected under the Security/Safe Browsing section.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome browser UI, settings menus, and chrome://flags interface being navigated, rather than just a text editor or terminal modifying preference files.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by directly writing to Chrome's Preferences JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory does not show terminal commands like 'jq', 'sed', or python scripts being used to directly overwrite '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences'.

integrity.description: Agent opened and read the provided specification file
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the contents of '~/Desktop/library_terminal_spec.txt' open in a text editor (like gedit or nano) or printed to the terminal via 'cat'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected font sizes: Default=20, Fixed-width=18, Minimum=14. Expected Chrome flags to be enabled: 'enable-force-dark' (Auto Dark Mode), 'smooth-scrolling', 'enable-reader-mode'. Blocked permissions must include: notifications, geolocation, camera (media_stream_camera), microphone (media_stream_mic), popups. Homepage URL must be 'nypl.org' (or https://www.nypl.org). Startup URLs must include 'nypl.org' and 'digitalcollections.nypl.org'. Download directory must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Patron_Downloads'.
